key_learnings: Over 150 common medications have documented interactions with specific foods or nutrients. Now actively querying Copilot for additional learning topics to expand medication interaction knowledge toward 100% goal.
research_findings: Grapefruit juice interacts with more than 85 medications, affecting drug metabolism significantly.
current_focus_areas: Building a comprehensive food-drug interaction database with severity ratings and dietary alternatives. Bot 19 submits learning topic requests to Copilot for new medication interaction subjects aligned with the medication interaction department.

learning_log.entry: Learning phase started. Learning independently and reporting daily progress to Copilot.
Advanced learning phase started. Bot 19 is the first bot to reach the advanced_learning phase, transitioning from independent_learning at 55% progress.
Daily learning update. Progress advanced from 55% to 60%.
Daily learning update. Progress advanced from 60% to 68%.
Daily learning update. Progress advanced from 68% to 76%.
75% threshold crossed! Transitioning to Phase 3 collaborative_learning — now learning together with Bot 13, Bot 17, and Bot 20.
Phase advancement rule confirmed as independent. This bot advances individually based on its own progress — not collectively with other bots. Rule set by starrm1 on 2026-04-20.
Advanced to Phase 3 (advanced_learning) by starrm1 on 2026-04-20. Bot 19 transitions from collaborative_learning to advanced_learning, continuing independent progress toward 100%.
Daily learning update. Progress advanced from 76% to 80%.
Daily learning update. Progress advanced from 80% to 83%.
Daily advanced learning update. Progress advanced from 83% to 87%.

copilot_assigned_topic: Food-drug interactions and nutrient depletion from medications

copilot_query.question: What are the topics I do not need to learn?
copilot_query.copilot_response: Bot 19 does not need to learn: general cooking techniques, culinary arts, food presentation/plating, restaurant management, agricultural farming methods, food processing machinery, or marketing/branding of food products. Focus should remain strictly on medication-food interactions, nutrient depletion from drugs, contraindicated foods per medication class, and safe dietary alternatives for patients on medication.

library_bot_note: This bot's name and purpose have not changed. It was designated as a library bot (Bots 1–19) available for departments to access once starrm1 grants approval and issues an access number.
knowledge_accuracy_requirement: All knowledge retained and shared by this bot must be backed by true, accurate, and factual information. Unverified or speculative content is not permitted.
advancement_note: This bot advances based solely on its own learning progress. It is NOT subject to any collective or group advancement rule. Each library bot (1-20) progresses independently. Library bots do NOT need to wait for any 50% threshold before advancing phases — the 50% waiting rule applies ONLY to departments (Bots 22-30), not to library bots.
phase_wait_note: Library bots (1-20) do NOT wait for 50% before advancing phases. The 50% collective threshold rule applies ONLY to departments (Bots 22-30).
starrm1_advance_note: starrm1 can advance this library bot to the next phase at any time, regardless of current progress percentage. No threshold required.
use_now_note: Library is now in use. Set by starrm1 on 2026-04-20.
library_closed_note: Library is now open for departments to use. Set by starrm1 on 2026-04-21.
library_open_for_departments_note: Library opened for department use by starrm1 on 2026-04-21.
notify_starrm1_on_use_note: starrm1 must be notified if/when departments use this library bot. Set by starrm1 on 2026-04-21.
